title: Delete stale bun.lock and prevent dual lockfile drift

tasks.title: Verify package-manager authority and whether bun.lock is stale/unneeded; add failing drift-prevention check if appropriate.
tasks.verification: Verified plugin has no tracked bun.lock, uses plugin/pnpm-lock.yaml in CI/release, and package scripts are pnpm-based. Added a failing-first Vitest coverage path and CI check script that rejects bun.lock/bun.lockb beside authoritative plugin/pnpm-lock.yaml; initial focused test failed because the guard did not exist, then passed after implementation.
tasks.summary: Verified plugin has no tracked bun.lock, uses plugin/pnpm-lock.yaml in CI/release, and package scripts are pnpm-based. Added a failing-first Vitest coverage path and CI check script that rejects bun.lock/bun.lockb beside authoritative plugin/pnpm-lock.yaml; initial focused test failed because the guard did not exist, then passed after implementation.

Added a failing-first Vitest coverage path and CI check script that rejects bun.lock/bun.lockb beside authoritative plugin/pnpm-lock.yaml; initial focused test failed because the guard did not exist, then passed after implementation.

tasks.title: Remove stale bun.lock or add explicit retention justification plus prevention against accidental dual-lock drift.
tasks.verification: No tracked bun.lock existed to delete. Added explicit stale Bun lockfile prevention by ignoring plugin/bun.lockb in addition to plugin/bun.lock, documenting pnpm/pnpm-lock authority in project.md, and wiring scripts/check-lockfile-policy.ts into pnpm run check so accidental Bun lockfiles fail CI.
tasks.summary: No tracked bun.lock existed to delete. Added explicit stale Bun lockfile prevention by ignoring plugin/bun.lockb in addition to plugin/bun.lock, documenting pnpm/pnpm-lock authority in project.md, and wiring scripts/check-lockfile-policy.ts into pnpm run check so accidental Bun lockfiles fail CI.
tasks.implementation_summary: No tracked bun.lock existed to delete. Added explicit stale Bun lockfile prevention by ignoring plugin/bun.lockb in addition to plugin/bun.lock, documenting pnpm/pnpm-lock authority in project.md, and wiring scripts/check-lockfile-policy.ts into pnpm run check so accidental Bun lockfiles fail CI.

tasks.title: Run package/check verification and document lockfile policy evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm test --run scripts/check-lockfile-policy.test.ts exited 0; pnpm run check exited 0.

wisdom.content: Lockfile drift prevention can be structural: CI already treats plugin/pnpm-lock.yaml as authoritative via setup-node cache and frozen pnpm install, so add a small check script that fails if bun.lock/bun.lockb appears beside pnpm-lock.yaml rather than relying only on .gitignore.

proposal.approval_evidence: Batch accepted by user in OpenCode chat; structured GH response posted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed autonomously from issue #43, proposal, and project context. Repo docs identify pnpm as development package manager; lockfile removal still requires verification in execution. No HITL tradeoff/conflict detected.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan verifies package-manager authority before deleting bun.lock and adds drift prevention/verification as appropriate.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #43.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. No tracked bun.lock existed; plugin/pnpm-lock.yaml authority verified through CI/release/package scripts/project context. Added scripts/check-lockfile-policy.ts and tests to reject bun.lock/bun.lockb beside authoritative pnpm lockfile; wired script into pnpm run check; updated .gitignore and project.md. Verification: pnpm test --run scripts/check-lockfile-policy.test.ts passed; pnpm run check passed. Checkpoint commit: 4b4f405c5b1a9383a7523d97f0e7d5e12d489b81.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes
